001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.view;
002
003import android.content.Context;
004import android.graphics.Canvas;
005import android.graphics.Color;
006import android.graphics.Paint;
007import android.graphics.Rect;
008import android.graphics.drawable.Drawable;
009import android.util.AttributeSet;
010import android.view.MotionEvent;
011import android.view.View;
012import android.view.View.OnTouchListener;
013import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
014import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
015import androidx.appcompat.content.res.AppCompatResources;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.R;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo.DigSiteCoord;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type.DigSiteSquareState;
020import java.util.Map;
021import java.util.function.Consumer;
022
023/**
024 * Custom view for rendering the dig site game board. Displays a grid of squares with different
025 * appearances based on their state, and handles touch events for cell selection.
026 */
027public class DigSiteView extends View {
028
029  private final Context context;
030  private int xCells = 1;
031  private int yCells = 1;
032  private int cellDim;
033  private Map<DigSiteCoord, DigSiteSquare> gridSquares;
034  private Consumer<DigSiteCoord> onCellClickListener;
035
036  /**
037   * Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context.
038   *
039   * @param context Application context.
040   */
041  public DigSiteView(Context context) {
042    super(context);
043    this.context = context;
044  }
045
046  /**
047   * Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context and attribute set.
048   *
049   * @param context Application context.
050   * @param attrs XML attributes.
051   */
052  public DigSiteView(Context context, @Nullable AttributeSet attrs) {
053    super(context, attrs);
054    this.context = context;
055
056  }
057
058  /**
059   * Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context, attributes, and default style.
060   *
061   * @param context Application context.
062   * @param attrs XML attributes.
063   * @param defStyleAttr Default style attribute.
064   */
065  public DigSiteView(Context context, @Nullable AttributeSet attrs, int defStyleAttr) {
066    super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr);
067    this.context = context;
068
069  }
070
071  /**
072   * Constructs a DigSiteView with the specified context, attributes, and default style resources.
073   *
074   * @param context Application context.
075   * @param attrs XML attributes.
076   * @param defStyleAttr Default style attribute.
077   * @param defStyleRes Default style resource.
078   */
079  public DigSiteView(Context context, @Nullable AttributeSet attrs, int defStyleAttr,
080      int defStyleRes) {
081    super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes);
082    this.context = context;
083  }
084
085  /**
086   * Sets the grid data to display and triggers a layout or invalidation as needed.
087   *
088   * @param gridSquares Map of coordinates to dig site squares.
089   */
090  public void setGridSquares(Map<DigSiteCoord, DigSiteSquare> gridSquares) {
091    this.gridSquares = gridSquares;
092    int xCellsNew = gridSquares.keySet().stream().mapToInt(DigSiteCoord::x).max().orElse(0) + 1;
093    int yCellsNew = gridSquares.keySet().stream().mapToInt(DigSiteCoord::y).max().orElse(0) + 1;
094    if (xCellsNew != xCells || yCellsNew != yCells) {
095      xCells = xCellsNew;
096      yCells = yCellsNew;
097      requestLayout();
098    } else {
099      postInvalidate();
100    }
101  }
102
103  /**
104   * Sets the listener to be called when a cell is clicked.
105   *
106   * @param listener Consumer that receives the clicked coordinate.
107   */
108  public void setOnCellClickListener(Consumer<DigSiteCoord> listener) {
109    this.onCellClickListener = listener;
110  }
111
112  @Override
113  protected void onMeasure(int widthMeasureSpec, int heightMeasureSpec) {
114    if (gridSquares == null) {
115      setMeasuredDimension(0, 0);
116      return;
117    }
118    int suggestedW = getSuggestedMinimumWidth();
119    int suggestedH = getSuggestedMinimumHeight();
120    int width = resolveSizeAndState(getPaddingLeft() + getPaddingRight() + suggestedW,
121        widthMeasureSpec, 0);
122    int height = resolveSizeAndState(getPaddingTop() + getPaddingBottom() + suggestedH,
123        heightMeasureSpec, 0);
124
125    int heightFromWidth = width * yCells / xCells;
126    int widthFromHeight = height * xCells / yCells;
127
128    if (heightFromWidth > height) {
129      setMeasuredDimension(widthFromHeight, height);
130      cellDim = height / yCells;
131    } else {
132      setMeasuredDimension(width, heightFromWidth);
133      cellDim = width / xCells;
134    }
135  }
136
137  @Override
138  protected void onDraw(@NonNull Canvas canvas) {
139    super.onDraw(canvas);
140    if (gridSquares != null) {
141      gridSquares.forEach((key, cellData) -> {
142        Drawable tile = cellToDrawableTile(cellData);
143        tile.setBounds(gridCoordinateToBounds(key));
144        tile.draw(canvas);
145        // Add drawing a number in the center of the square based on getMooreNeighborFossils value
146        boolean visibleNumber = cellData.getState() == DigSiteSquareState.DUG || cellData.getState() == DigSiteSquareState.EXTRACTED;
147        int mooreNeighborFossils = cellData.getMooreNeighborFossils();
148        if (mooreNeighborFossils > 0 && visibleNumber) {
149          float textCellRatio = 0.8F;
150          float centerOffset = cellDim * ( 0.5F + textCellRatio / 2.0F);
151          Paint paint = new Paint();
152          paint.setColor(Color.GREEN);
153          paint.setShadowLayer(4, 4, 4, Color.BLACK);
154          paint.setTextSize(textCellRatio * cellDim);
155          paint.setTextAlign(Paint.Align.CENTER);
156          canvas.drawText(String.valueOf(mooreNeighborFossils),
157                          key.x() * cellDim + cellDim / 2.0F,
158                          key.y() * cellDim + centerOffset,
159                          paint);
160        }
161      });
162    }
163  }
164
165  @Override
166  public boolean onTouchEvent(MotionEvent event) {
167    if (event.getAction() == MotionEvent.ACTION_UP) {
168      if (gridSquares != null && onCellClickListener != null) {
169        DigSiteCoord coord = pixelToGridCoordinate((int) event.getX(), (int) event.getY());
170        if (gridSquares.containsKey(coord)) {
171          onCellClickListener.accept(coord);
172          return true;
173        }
174      }
175    }
176    return super.onTouchEvent(event);
177  }
178
179  /**
180   * Converts pixel coordinates to grid coordinates.
181   *
182   * @param x X pixel position.
183   * @param y Y pixel position.
184   * @return Grid coordinate.
185   */
186  private DigSiteCoord pixelToGridCoordinate(int x, int y) {
187    return new DigSiteCoord(x / cellDim, y / cellDim);
188  }
189
190  /**
191   * Converts grid coordinates to pixel bounds for drawing.
192   *
193   * @param coord Grid coordinate.
194   * @return Rectangle bounds for the cell.
195   */
196  private Rect gridCoordinateToBounds(DigSiteCoord coord) {
197    return new Rect(
198        coord.x() * cellDim,
199        coord.y() * cellDim,
200        (coord.x() + 1) * cellDim,
201        (coord.y() + 1) * cellDim);
202  }
203
204  /**
205   * Selects the appropriate drawable tile for a cell based on its state and fossil content.
206   *
207   * @param cellData Dig site square data.
208   * @return Drawable to render for this cell.
209   */
210  private Drawable cellToDrawableTile(DigSiteSquare cellData) {
211    DigSiteSquareState state = cellData.getState();
212    return switch (state) {
213      case UNTOUCHED -> AppCompatResources.getDrawable(context, R.drawable.rock);
214      case FENCED -> AppCompatResources.getDrawable(context, R.drawable.packed_planks);
215      case DUG -> cellData.isHasFossil()
216          ? AppCompatResources.getDrawable(context, R.drawable.powder)
217          : AppCompatResources.getDrawable(context, R.drawable.path_tile);
218      case EXTRACTED -> cellData.isHasFossil()
219          ? AppCompatResources.getDrawable(context, R.drawable.fossil)
220          : AppCompatResources.getDrawable(context, R.drawable.path_tile);
221    };
222  }
223
224}
